title: Subway and Streetcar Operators
description: Operate subway or elevated suburban trains with no separate locomotive, or electric-powered streetcar, to transport passengers. May handle fares.

tasks.text: Monitor lights indicating obstructions or other trains ahead and watch for car and truck traffic at crossings to stay alert to potential hazards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Operate controls to open and close transit vehicle doors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive and control rail-guided public transportation, such as subways, elevated trains, and electric-powered streetcars, trams, or trolleys, to transport passengers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report delays, mechanical problems, and emergencies to supervisors or dispatchers, using radios.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Regulate vehicle speed and the time spent at each stop to maintain schedules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make announcements to passengers, such as notifications of upcoming stops or schedule delays.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Complete reports, including shift summaries and incident or accident reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Greet passengers, provide information, and answer questions concerning fares, schedules, transfers, and routings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend meetings on driver and passenger safety to learn ways in which job performance might be affected.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
